recommendations.task: Continue the governed supervisor loop until lease minimums, ready work, or terminal blockers are resolved.
recommendations.gate: Final response remains denied while lease minimums, ready nodes, or exact next action remain.
recommendations.exact_next_action: run ao-mission continue --mission mission-debd096b253d7c1e --until-done --max-iterations 10

recommendations.task: Refresh the Atlas workgraph from current Mission readiness, event-index digest, and final rollup evidence.
recommendations.gate: Atlas workgraph refresh records total, completed, ready, and blocked node counts.
recommendations.exact_next_action: import the current Mission record and emit the next bounded Atlas workgraph node

recommendations.task: Consume exactly one safe ready Atlas node and return a run-link or terminal rollup.
recommendations.gate: Exactly one executable mutation node is active and it produces run-link or terminal evidence.
recommendations.exact_next_action: run Foundry on the first ready node only and record run-link evidence

recommendations.task: Persist and verify a checkpoint/resume bundle after each completed node or timed interval.
recommendations.gate: Checkpoint bundle includes latest route, phase, exact next action, and return gate.
recommendations.exact_next_action: inspect the latest checkpoint bundle before any final response

recommendations.task: Reconcile current route, Atlas readiness, Foundry rollup, Promoter verdict, and Command readback.
recommendations.gate: Route reconciliation binds the newest route and blocks stale final status.
recommendations.exact_next_action: run mission events search for route, rollup, promoter, command, CI, and blocker evidence

recommendations.task: Index and search route, node, PR, CI, rollup, and blocker evidence for the active mission.
recommendations.gate: Event search returns mission-bound evidence for node, PR, CI, rollup, and blocker kinds.
recommendations.exact_next_action: record event search readbacks for every terminal node before closure

recommendations.task: Emit a compact long-run mission timeline readback for operator scanning.
recommendations.gate: Command readback summarizes status, ready work, blockers, and exact next action.
recommendations.exact_next_action: bind Mission dashboard and event-index output into AO Command readback

recommendations.task: Record promotion or no-promotion readiness for the exact terminal rollup status.
recommendations.gate: Promoter summary records no-promotion or exact missing evidence without broad RSI claims.
recommendations.exact_next_action: keep broad RSI denied unless governed evidence separately proves it

recommendations.task: Scan changed public docs and readbacks for unsafe or stale public-safety wording.
recommendations.gate: Sentinel scan passes without broad capability or RSI wording.
recommendations.exact_next_action: record Sentinel/public-safety wording evidence before rollup closure

recommendations.task: Keep the operator runbook explicit about Mission, Atlas, Blueprint, Foundry, and long-run requests.
recommendations.gate: Runbook explains when to use Mission, Atlas, Blueprint, Foundry, and how to request long runs.
recommendations.exact_next_action: update docs/operator-next-actions.md with 2-3 hour Mission usage

recommendations.task: Run tests, vet, build, production-readiness, and public-safety wording scans over changed artifacts.
recommendations.gate: Verification evidence includes local tests, build, readiness, and wording scan status.
recommendations.exact_next_action: record verification command output in the mission evidence root

recommendations.task: Prove final response is denied while ready nodes or exact next actions remain.
recommendations.gate: Regression fails if ready nodes can still allow final response.
recommendations.exact_next_action: add or run a final-response denial regression before node closure

recommendations.task: Compare the latest session duration metadata with the lease target without reading session contents.
recommendations.gate: Duration ledger reports elapsed minutes and never inspects prompt or credential content.
recommendations.exact_next_action: record duration-ledger readback and exact continuation reason when target time is unmet

recommendations.task: Generate an Atlas continuation prompt packet from current readiness, final rollup, and event-index evidence.
recommendations.gate: Prompt packet includes event-index digest, final-rollup digest, and ready-node denial wording.
recommendations.continuation_command: ao-mission final atlas-prompt --mission mission-debd096b253d7c1e --event-index tmp/event-index.json --out tmp/atlas-prompt.json
recommendations.exact_next_action: refresh Atlas prompt packet and deny final response if ready work remains

recommendations.task: Normalize completed, promoted, denied, and blocked terminal rollup statuses before route decisions.
recommendations.gate: Terminal status normalization records done or blocker status without preserving stale denial blindly.
recommendations.exact_next_action: import a terminal Foundry rollup fixture and verify exact Mission route/readback state

recommendations.task: Record local and remote codex branch cleanup evidence after each merged node.
recommendations.gate: Branch cleanup evidence shows no current node branch remains after merge.
recommendations.exact_next_action: fetch with prune and record branch cleanup in node evidence

recommendations.task: Bind PR and CI run links to the node evidence root before completing the node.
recommendations.gate: CI evidence contains passing jobs and merge head for the completed node.
recommendations.exact_next_action: record PR number, CI job results, and merge head for the active node

recommendations.task: Audit every active node for a rollback record before implementation evidence is accepted.
recommendations.gate: Each node evidence root contains rollback record and verification output.
recommendations.exact_next_action: reject node closure if rollback evidence is missing

recommendations.task: Route directly through Atlas or Foundry unless a node genuinely needs new requirements or authorization from Blueprint.
recommendations.gate: Route decision denies Blueprint for ordinary bounded implementation work.
recommendations.exact_next_action: record route decision explaining why Blueprint was not used for implementation nodes

recommendations.task: Regenerate final synthesis readback and verify it blocks final status until minimum nodes and ready-work gates clear.
recommendations.gate: Final synthesis carries exact next action and at least the minimum Feature Depth recommendations.
recommendations.exact_next_action: run final synthesis and compare completed, ready, blocked, and final-response fields
